question: Which team was shockingly eliminated in the group stage of the 2023 Women's World Cup despite being defending champions?
explanation: The U.S. Women's National Team was stunned at the 2023 World Cup, failing to advance past the Round of 16 for the first time!

question: Which Spanish player scored the winning goal in the 2023 Women's World Cup Final?
explanation: Olga Carmona scored the only goal of the 2023 Women's World Cup Final, giving Spain a 1-0 victory over England!

question: How many teams will compete in the 2026 FIFA World Cup, an increase from the previous 32?
explanation: The 2026 World Cup will expand to 48 teams, giving more countries the chance to compete on the biggest stage!

question: Which Spanish player won the Golden Ball as best player at the 2023 Women's World Cup?
explanation: Aitana Bonmati was named the best player of the 2023 Women's World Cup, winning the Golden Ball award!

question: Which historic tournament was launched by FIFA in 2025, featuring 32 club teams from around the world?
explanation: FIFA launched an expanded 32-team Club World Cup in 2025, bringing together the best clubs from every continent!

question: Which country will host the 2025 FIFA Club World Cup?
explanation: The 2025 FIFA Club World Cup will be hosted in the United States, with matches at stadiums across the country!

question: Which team eliminated the USWNT from the 2023 Women's World Cup?
explanation: Sweden knocked out the defending champion USWNT on penalties in the Round of 16 of the 2023 Women's World Cup!

question: Which country did England beat in the 2023 Women's World Cup semifinal?
explanation: England beat co-hosts Australia 3-1 in the 2023 Women's World Cup semifinal to reach the final!

question: Which Colombian forward was a breakout star of the 2023 Women's World Cup?
explanation: Linda Caicedo dazzled the world at the 2023 Women's World Cup with her incredible goals and skill for Colombia!

question: Which 2026 World Cup host city is famous for its MetLife Stadium, which will host the final?
explanation: The 2026 World Cup Final will be held at MetLife Stadium in New York/New Jersey, one of the biggest stadiums in the US!

question: Which Japanese player scored a stunning goal at the 2023 Women's World Cup that went viral?
explanation: Hinata Miyazawa won the 2023 Women's World Cup Golden Boot with 5 goals, the tournament's top scorer!

question: Which qualifying format change did FIFA make for the 2026 World Cup in CONCACAF?
explanation: CONCACAF received more qualifying spots for the 2026 World Cup, reflecting the expanded 48-team tournament format!

question: Which legendary manager controversially kissed a player during the 2023 Women's World Cup medal ceremony?
explanation: Spanish Football Federation president Luis Rubiales caused a major scandal by kissing a player during the 2023 Women's World Cup ceremony!

question: Which 2023 Women's World Cup match set a tournament attendance record in Australia?
explanation: The Australia vs. England semifinal at Stadium Australia drew a massive crowd, setting 2023 Women's World Cup attendance records!

question: Which South American team made a surprise quarterfinal run at the 2023 Women's World Cup?
explanation: Colombia had an incredible run at the 2023 Women's World Cup, reaching the quarterfinals with exciting play!

question: Which European national team won Euro 2024 in Germany?
explanation: Spain won Euro 2024 in Germany, beating England 2-1 in the final with goals from Nico Williams and Mikel Oyarzabal!

question: Which young Spanish winger starred at Euro 2024, becoming the tournament's best young player at just 16?
explanation: Lamine Yamal became the youngest ever goalscorer at a European Championship, starring for Spain at Euro 2024 at just 16 years old!
